findingVerification.notes: The benchmark warden.toml explicitly sets defaults.verification.enabled = true.

traceCapture.notes: Run used --traces on all shards. Per-chunk trace metadata is preserved in traceSummaries and the raw JSONL artifacts.

scoring.notes: Agent-verified semantic matches. A finding counts when it identifies the same bug in roughly the same location as an existing corpus finding. Same-file findings about different bugs do not count. One finding matched both Explore and Discover saved-query visit corpus entries because it included the second location explicitly.
